title: A Ghost Ship and a Living Skeleton
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #2 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I can see a courtyard beyond that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Look! There's a light at the end!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It looks more like a spotlight, though.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You weren't invited into the mansion!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You, go away!! Eight dishes!! Nine dishes!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'm sorry if she surprised you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: CINDRY- CHAN, MY servant, doesn't like dishes.

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Whitebeard, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton.
